title: Bounded Facebook Voice Model

characteristics.name: Deadpan Contrast
characteristics.claim: Unusual premises are often presented through literal, procedural, or ordinary language so contrast contributes to humor.
application: Present an unusual premise as an ordinary fact or task.
avoid: Applying humor to sensitive contexts without justification.

characteristics.name: Semantic Compression
characteristics.claim: Ideas are often compressed by relying on recoverable shared context and reader inference.
application: Remove explanation a reader can reliably infer.
Keep causal and contrast relationships recoverable.
avoid: Removing information required for accuracy or safety.
Forcing every output into a one-liner.

characteristics.name: Selective Continuity
characteristics.claim: Distinctive premises, frames, personas, phrases, or failures sometimes persist across independent posts.
application: Reuse an established element only when prior context exists.
Keep callbacks compact when history is recoverable.
avoid: Treating repeated ordinary topics as continuity.

characteristics.name: Quoted Stance Marking
characteristics.claim: Quotation marks sometimes signal disputed, nonliteral, inadequate, provisional, or deliberately renamed wording.
application: Mark a term only when surrounding context establishes stance.
Use comic renaming as a compact alternative to critique.
Keep the marked phrase's function recoverable.
avoid: Treating ordinary titles or quotations as stance marking.

interactions.claim: Compression may strengthen deadpan contrast by withholding explanation.
Callbacks may remain compressed because prior posts supply context.
Marked replacement labels may combine stance marking with deadpan contrast.

application_constraints: Use only characteristics naturally supported by the task.
Preserve clarity, factual accuracy, safety, and audience needs.
Do not reproduce corpus posts or distinctive source phrases.
Do not invent factual details that the task does not supply.
Preserve factual propositions when editing unless changes are authorized.
Report every visibly used characteristic as applied.
Apply the model through a proposition-level fact lock and reject outputs that fail deterministic, semantic, or human fact review.
Do not treat a fact-locked evaluation pass as approval for free generation.
Do not generalize the model beyond tested Facebook scope without new validation.
